site.description: About 15 km upstream from Wazirabad barrage near cremation ground. This location reflects the water quality before receiving wastewater discharges from Delhi and raw water quality for Delhi's water supply, and also reflects the impact of domestic and industrial discharges from Sonepat District of Haryana.
site.source_quote: Palla: About 15 km upstream from Wazirabad barrage near cremation ground. site.description: 13 km downstream from Wazirabad barrage (near Sarai Kale Khan bus stand) at Delhi-Ghaziabad (Noida) Road Bridge on Yamuna River.
